goal: Clerk skeleton in apps/planning-app: install @clerk/nextjs, mount middleware that protects /api/dev/* and /projects/edit/*, render UserButton in header, expose helper that resolves operator id (Clerk userId or 'solo-operator' fallback). Stamp publishedBy on the publish PATCH route from auth(). Solo-operator fallback when CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY/CLERK_SECRET_KEY are unset so local dev keeps working without Clerk creds.
